verses.text: Pentekos ni hong tun' ciangin Jesuh a um mi khempeuh mun khatah kikhawm uh hi
Tua laitakin huihpi nung bangin huging khat hong tungvat a, amaute' kikhopna innsung khempeuh hong dim hi
Tua ciangin leii tawh a kibang meikuang bang pian amaute lakah hong kithehthang a, tuate in mi khempeuh sukha kim hi
Amaute khempeuh Kha Siangtho tawh kidim uh a, tua Kha in minam dangte' pau tawh amaute a pau theisak hi
Tua laitakin biakna pawi siim dingin gam tuamtuam panin a hong pai Jew mi biakna hahkat mi tampi tak, Jerusalem khuasungah a om uh hi
Hih huging a zak uh ciangin mihon tampi tak hong kikhawm uh a, hih Jesuh a um mite' thugen pen amau' pau ciatin za uh ahih manin lamdang a sa mahmah uh hi
Amaute in hih thu lamdangsa mahmah uh ahih manin, “Hih thugen mite pen Galilee mi vive hilo ahi hiam
Tua hinapi-in bang hangin amaute' thugen pen eima pau ciatin za ihi hiam
Eite pen Parthia gam, Media gam, Elam gam, Mesopotamia gam, Judea gam, Kappadosia gam, Pontas gam, Asia gam
Frigia gam, Pamfilia gam, Egypt gam, leh Sairin khuapi gei-a om Libya gamte pan ihi a, pawlkhatte Rom gam pan ihi hi
Jew mite leh Gentail mi Jew biakna a zuite ihi a, pawlkhatte pen Krete gam leh Arabia gam pan ihi hi. Tua bang hinapi-in, Pasian' sep na lamdang liante a kigenna eima pau ciatin i za hi,” a ci uh hi
Amaute in lamdangsa-in lungmang mahmah uh a, “A bangci thu ahi hiam?” ci-in khatlekhat a kidong uh hi
Ahi zongin mi pawlkhatte in hih Jesuh a umte simmawhbawl uh a, “Zukham ahi uh hi,” ci-in a zahko uh hi.

Tua ciangin sawltak sawmlekhatte tawh a omkhawm Peter hong dingto-in, mihonte tungah nakpi takin thu hong gen a, “Ka mipih ahi Jew mite leh Jerusalem khuasunga om mi khempeuhte aw, hih thupiang hong gen ding ka hih manin limtakin na ngai un
Tuhun pen zingsang nai kua hi pan ahih manin, note' ngaihsut bangin hih mite zukham hilo uh hi
Hih thupiang pen kamsang Joel in a gensa thu hi a, tua sungah

‘Pasian in hih bangin gen hi: Nitawp ni ciangin, mi khempeuh tungah ka Kha ka sung ding a, na tanute uh leh na tapate un keima thu taangko ding uh hi; na tangvalte un maang mu ding uh a, na puteekte un mang man ding uh hi
Tua ni ciangin ka nasem numeite leh ka nasem pasalte' tung nangawnah ka Kha ka sung ding a, amaute in keima thu gen ding uh hi
Tua ciangin vantung leh leitungah hilhkholhna lim leh na lamdang ka bawl ding hi. Sisan kiluan'sakna, meikatna leh meikhu sahpi hong om ding hi
Topa' ni, a lian thupi ni, hong tun'ma-in ni hong mialin, kha, sisan hong bang ding hi
Ahi zongin Topa tungah huhna a ngen khempeuh in hotkhiatna ngah ding uh hi,’ ci-in a kigelh hi

“Ka mipih Israel-te aw, hih ka thugen na ngai un: Nazareth khuami Jesuh tung tawnin Pasian in lim leh na lamdangte bawlin na hong sem ahih manin, Jesuh pen Pasian' sawl nasem ahihna teltakin na thei uh hi. Hih thu pen note lakah a piang thu ahih manin nomau mahmah in na thei uh hi
Pasian in thu a ma theihkholhna leh ama geelna tawh kizui-in note' khutsungah tua Jesuh a hong piakding a ngaihsutsa hi a, note in singlamteh tungah khai-in migilote' khut tawh amah na that uh hi
Ahi zongin Pasian in misite lak panin amah hingkiksak a, sihna in amah lencip zolo ahih manin sihna hanga gimna panin amah a suaktasak hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh David in ama thu a genna-ah, “‘Topa ka maingat tawntung a, ka taklamah amah om ahih manin lungkhamna ka thuak kei ding hi
Tua ahih manin ka lungdam a, kei ka nuam hi. A si thei mihing ka hih lel hangin lungmuang takin ka om ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh misite' gamah kei nong nusiacip kei ding a, na nasem keimah muatna nong thuaksak kei ding hi
Nangmah in nuntakna lampi na hong lak khin a, nong ompihna tawh kei nong lungdamsak hi,’ ci hi
“Sanggamte aw, note' theihdingin i pupi David' thu a teltakin kong gen ding hi. Amah si-in kivui a, a han zong tu mahmahin eite kiangah omlai hi
David pen kamsang hi a, ama tunga Pasian' thuciam a thei hi. Ama suante khat, amah bang teek mahin kumpi-in a bawlna ding Pasian in thu a ciam hi
Pasian in a sep ding thu David in mukhol ahih manin, ‘Mi site gamsungah amah kinusia lo a, a sa a muat kei hi,’ ci-in a gen ciangin, Khrih' thawhkikna ding thu a gengen ahi hi
Pasian in sihna panin hih Jesuh hingkiksak a, kote khempeuh pen hih thu a thei teci vive ka hi uh hi
Amah in Pasian' taklamah omna dongin liatna ngah a, ama tungah Pasian in a ciamsa Kha Siangtho zong a ngahkhin hi. Tu laitaka na muh na zak uh nate pen kote tungah a hong piak tua Kha Siangtho ahi hi
David pen vantungah a kahtohloh hangin amah in, ‘Topa in keima Topa kiangah: Na khe nuai-ah na galte kong koihsak matengin ka taklamah na tu in, ci-in gen hi,’ ci hi
“Tua ahih ciangin singlamteh tungah na thah uh hih Jesuh pen Pasian in Topa leh Khrih-in a bawl khitna thu, Israel mi khempeuh in teltakin thei ta un,” a ci hi
Amaute in hih thu a zak uh ciangin a lungsim uh nakpi takin sukha a, Peter leh sawltak dangte kiangah, “Sanggamte aw, bangci gamtat ding ka hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi

Tua ciangin Peter in amaute kiangah, “Na mawhna uh kisik un la, na mawhna uh hong kimaisak theihna dingin Jesuh Khrih min tawh tui kiphum ciat un. Tua hi leh Pasian' piakkhong Kha Siangtho na ngah ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in ama kamciamna pen note tung, na suan na khakte uh tung leh gamlapi-a om mi khempeuh, i Topa Pasian in a sap mi khempeuh tungah a hong bawl ahi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi
Tua ciangin Peter in amaute tungah thu tampi genthuahin hanthawn a, “Hih migilote' gimthuak ding na tuahkhak lohna dingun nomau mah in na suahtakna ding uh lampi zong ciat un,” a ci hi
Mi tampi in ama thugen umin tui kiphum uh a, tua ni-in mihing tul thum bang kibehlap uh hi
Amaute in sawltakte tung panin thu sinin amaute tawh kikhawl uh a, amaute tawh an nekhawmin, thu zong a ngenkhawm uh hi.
Sawltakte in lim leh na lamdang tampi bawl uh a, mi khempeuh in lamdang sa mahmah uh hi
Thu um khempeuh kikhawlin omkhawm uh a, a neihsate uh zong a neikhawm uh hi
Amaute in a neih a lamteng uh zuak uh a, a sumte pen amau kisapna tawh kizui-in amaute lakah a hawm uh hi
Nisimin biakinn-ah kikhawm uh a, a innte uhah an nekhawmin, lungdamna leh kiniamkhiatna tawh a ne ciat uh hi
Pasian phat uh a, khatlekhat thupha kideihsakin a om uh hi. Pasian in nisimin hotkhiatna a ngah mi kibehlapsak tawntung hi.
